ops.title: Dedup generator-emitted comments in lifeproto templates + regen both bindings
ops.description: Sources/DaemonKit/LifecycleWire.swift (generated) repeats "Features is the sole source of capability truth" 4× verbatim because the wire/lifeproto/gen templates emit it per message doc. Trim the emitted doc templates in gen/main.go + spec.go docs to terse identity lines (matching the repo-wide comment cleanup), run `go generate ./wire/...`, and land the regenerated lifeproto.go + LifecycleWire.swift together so the CI codegen drift gate stays green. Generated files were deliberately skipped by the 2026-07 comment cleanup sweep.

ops.text: gen templates emit terse docs (no repeated capability-truth paragraph)
both bindings regenerated in the same commit; codegen drift gate green
